landing.heroSubtitle: See what every rental earns and what it costs, manage each contract, and talk to your tenant — all in one place. For Brazilian landlords who'd rather keep the 8–12%.
landing.heroFoundingLine: That makes you a founding member — every rental free for the first year.
landing.waitlistSuccessBody: We'll email you the moment Mabenn opens — nothing before then.
landing.waitlistError: That didn't go through — that one's on us.
landing.p1Headline: Stay on top of rent and bills.
landing.p1Body1: Connect your bank. Invite your tenant to do the same. From there, Mabenn watches every payment land — rent in your account, utilities paid, condo boletos clearing. All confirmed without you asking.
landing.p1Body2: New bills find their way in too. Boletos appear the day they're issued. For utilities, each property gets its own Mabenn email — your providers send the bills there, no inbox digging.
landing.p1Closer: You don't enter anything. Your tenant doesn't either. Mabenn does it all.
landing.p1Mech1Body: On both sides — rent landing, bills paid, condo cleared. All caught automatically.
landing.p1Mech2Body: Mabenn knows the day a boleto is issued. Condo and beyond.
landing.p1Mech3Body: Your provider sends bills to Mabenn's address for your property. We read each one the moment it arrives.
landing.p1ExpandedMatched: Matched via Open Finance · 0.4s after landing
landing.p2Body1: Mabenn is where the entire rental contract lives — from the draft you create with a new tenant, through every adjustment and renewal, all the way to the final notice if it ever comes to that.
landing.p2Body2: When your IPCA adjustment is coming, Mabenn proposes the new rent. You and your tenant review and agree in the platform. When the contract is approaching expiration, both sides see the renewal window with time to talk it through.
landing.p2Body3: If rent comes in late, Mabenn drafts every notice the Lei do Inquilinato requires — and prepares the paperwork your lawyer would otherwise draft if it escalates to eviction.
landing.p2AiBody: The AI assistant reads the Lei do Inquilinato — tenant rights, eviction process, every regulation — and your specific contract. Both landlord and tenant can ask. Both sides see the same answer. For complex disputes, a lawyer is still the right call.
landing.p2Anchor: Every notification, proposal, and reply lives in Mabenn. No WhatsApp threads. No scattered emails. One trustworthy record from signing to renewal.
landing.p2Closer: You don't track. You don't draft. Mabenn keeps the contract running.
landing.p2Mech1Body: Annual adjustments, renewals, expirations. Mabenn tracks them all and nudges both sides before each one.
landing.p2Mech2Body: When the rent adjustment comes due, Mabenn suggests the new amount. Late payment? It drafts the formal notice.
landing.p2Mech3Body: AI that reads Brazilian rental law and your contract. Both sides can ask.
landing.p3Headline: Build trust. Take it with you.
landing.p3Body1: Choosing a new tenant shouldn't be a leap of faith. Mabenn gives you a verified payment record for every tenant — every rent paid on time, every bill cleared. You see exactly who you're signing with.
landing.p3Body2: Your own track record builds the same way — fast responses, fair adjustments, contracts honored. Good tenants come to landlords with a record they can verify. And it's yours to keep — show it to any future landlord or tenant, on Mabenn or off.
landing.p3Body3: No fake reviews. No drive-by ratings. Just the receipts.
landing.p3Closer: Trust isn't promised. It's earned. By you and your tenant.
landing.p3Mech1Body: Every on-time payment, every fast reply, every fair adjustment, every contract honored — all count. No fake reviews. No drive-by ratings. Just the receipts.
landing.p3Mech2Body: Show your record to any future landlord or tenant — on Mabenn or not. It's verified on its own.
landing.p3Mech3Body: Tenants build a payment history. Landlords build one too — fast replies, fair adjustments, contracts honored. Same rules, same scale.
landing.commHeadline: Every conversation about the rental. One record.
landing.commBody1: Maintenance requests, contract questions, end-of-term negotiations, disputes — they live in Mabenn, next to the rental they're about. Timestamped, attributable, never lost in WhatsApp or email threads.
landing.commBody2: If a disagreement ever comes up, the full history is right here — what was asked, when, and what was agreed. Neither side has to dig through old chats to prove it.
landing.commCloser: And every reply is on the clock — your response time becomes part of the record you both carry forward.
landing.commMech1Body: Photos, dates, who said what — the request and the reply, side by side.
landing.commMech2Body: Raise it with the source document attached. No he-said-she-said.
landing.commMech3Body: Reply fast and it shows in your rating — for both sides.
landing.commInboxBody: The washing machine is leaking and the pump seems dead. Photos attached.
landing.commInboxReply: Plumber booked for tomorrow morning — I'll confirm the time tonight.
landing.revBody1: Every paid rent, every cleared bill, every adjustment — Mabenn rolls them up into the only view that really matters: how much you're making.
landing.revBody2: See this month. See the year. See the lifetime of every contract. Across all your properties, or zoomed into one.
landing.revBody3: The numbers are real, sourced from real payments — not your memory, not your spreadsheet.
landing.p3LMetric2Label: IPCA adjustments at or below inflation
landing.p3LAct2: Sent IPCA adjustment at inflation rate
landing.revChip1Body: What's coming in right now, broken down by property.
landing.revChip2Body: Cumulative income for every contract and every year you've owned.
landing.revChip3Body: All your rentals on one dashboard, or zoom into any one.
landing.compHeadline: All the management. None of the manager.
landing.compBody: Property managers charge 8–12% for what's mostly tracking, paperwork, and chasing payments. Mabenn does that — automatically, for both sides — for a flat monthly price that doesn't scale with your rent. You handle the property. Mabenn handles the know-how.
landing.compRow5Mabenn: No one — you keep the relationship
landing.compCloserPart1: On a R$ 2.800 rent, a property manager takes
landing.compCloserPart2: every year you own the property.
landing.pricingHeadline: One flat price. Never a percentage.
landing.pricingBody: Never a percentage of your rent — a flat monthly price per rental. Your first rental is free; tenants are free forever.
landing.pricingBullet1: Your first rental is always free.
landing.pricingBullet2: Same product whether you have 1 rental or 30.
landing.pricingBullet3: Tenants are free forever — with or without you on Mabenn.
landing.pricingFoundingBody: Waitlist signups become founding members — every rental free for the first year, then R$ 39/month per rental, locked for life.
landing.twoSidesTitle: Two sides of the same rental.
landing.llBullet1: See what you're making — every month, every year, every contract.
landing.llBullet2: Stop chasing rent. Stop wondering if bills got paid.
landing.llBullet3: Never miss an adjustment, renewal, or late notice.
landing.llBullet4: Handle late rent without four-figure lawyer fees.
landing.llBullet5: Every conversation kept on record, in Mabenn.
landing.tenantBullet1: A verified payment record you can show your next landlord — on Mabenn or off.
landing.tenantBullet2: See what you owe. Watch every payment clear automatically.
landing.tenantBullet3: Know rent adjustments before they happen — and why.
landing.tenantBullet4: Read your contract in plain Portuguese, not legalese.
landing.tenantBullet5: File a maintenance request, raise a dispute, ask a question — every exchange on record.
landing.trustChip1Body: Your records live in São Paulo, on Brazilian soil.
landing.trustChip2Body: Your data, your rights — documented retention and audit trails.
landing.trustChip3Body: Mabenn reads only the transactions that confirm rent and bills — and never moves money.
landing.faqA1: Through Open Finance — the read-only, consent-based bank-sharing system regulated by Brazil's central bank. A licensed provider makes the connection (so Mabenn never sees your bank login) and reads only the transactions that confirm rent and bills. Mabenn never moves money, and you can disconnect anytime.
landing.faqQ2: What if my tenant won't connect their bank?
landing.faqA2: You're still covered. Even if you never invite a tenant — or they never accept — your own bank connection shows rent landing and any bills you pay. Tenants have every reason to connect too: their confirmations, bill tracking, and portable rating all depend on it, so Mabenn nudges them from the start.
landing.faqA3: Yes — built for LGPD from day one. Your records are stored in Brazil (São Paulo), with documented retention and audit trails on sensitive changes. A few international providers — hosting, analytics, email — operate under data-processing agreements with the safeguards LGPD requires.
landing.faqA4: Your contracts, payment history, and reputation export anytime. Mabenn is the system of record — not the only place your data can live.
landing.faqA5: Yes. Monthly billing stops at the next renewal; annual prorates the unused months back. No lock-in.
landing.faqQ6: If I connect my bank, what can the other side see?
landing.faqA6: Your bank transactions are never shown to anyone. Mabenn uses them only behind the scenes — to match a payment to a charge — then the platform shows just the result: rent paid, electricity paid, who it went to, and the amount. Your balance, your other transactions, and your accounts stay private.
landing.faqA7: Yes — free forever, with or without your landlord on Mabenn. You can sign up on your own to start building a payment record you keep.
landing.faqQ8: Can I manage more than one property — or one I co-own?
landing.faqA8: Yes — add as many as you have, each with its own contracts and billing. Co-own a property? Each owner gets their own login and the same full view.
landing.faqQ9: I'm an agent managing properties for clients — can I use Mabenn?
landing.faqA9: Yes. Agents and small imobiliárias manage their clients' properties from one place — and can show each owner what's happening with theirs.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Everyone who joins the waitlist becomes a founding member — every rental free for a year, then R$ 39/month per rental, locked for life.
landing.ctaFinePrint: No spam. We'll only email you when Mabenn is ready for you.
landing.ctaConsent: By joining the waitlist, you agree to our <privacy>Privacy Policy</privacy>.

whyWeAsk.title: Why we ask
whyWeAsk.bulletTrackingBR: We catch any boleto issued in your name — condo fees, property tax, the rest — so they never go missing.
whyWeAsk.bulletTrackingFallback: We help track any bills issued in your name.
whyWeAsk.bulletRouting: When a bill comes through, we know whether it's yours or the tenant's.
whyWeAsk.bulletDocuments: It appears on the rent receipts and contracts Mabenn generates for you.
